attributes.action: Newly qualified nurses deserve to be employed!
attributes.additional_details: We have worked three long hard years to obtain the nursing degree. There is apparantly a shortage of nurses yet there are no band 5 roles for newly qualifieds. Yet the same trusts still rely on agency and bank staff.  Something we cannot do without 6 months experience. The government lie and boast about a graduate guarantee scheme - if trusts are not hiring how can they guatentee a role? 200 plus newly qualifieds will now be signing on to receive benefits in August 2026. Its backwards.
attributes.background: What hapenned to the government graduate scheme? Trusts are not hiring newly qualifieds and when the advertise that they will, everyone gets put on a reserve list in case a role becomes available in the next 6 months but at the same time advise us to look elsewhere.

rejection.details: We’re not clear what you are actual calling for that falls within the Government’s or Parliament’s responsibility.
